In [1]:
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from sklearn.preprocessing import MinMaxScaler
from sklearn.metrics import mean_squared_error, mean_absolute_error, r2_score
from tensorflow.keras.models import Sequential
from tensorflow.keras.layers import LSTM, Dense
In [2]:
# 1. Load dữ liệu
file_paths = {
    "Brent_Crude_Oil": r"D:\Code\python\vi\Brent_Crude_Oil_data.csv",
    "Crude_Oil": r"D:\Code\python\vi\Crude_Oil_data.csv",
    "Heating_Oil": r"D:\Code\python\vi\Heating_Oil_data.csv",
    "Natural_Gas": r"D:\Code\python\vi\Natural_Gas_data.csv",
    "RBOB_Gasoline": r"D:\Code\python\vi\RBOB_Gasoline_data.csv"
}
In [3]:
dataframes = {}
scalers = {}
close_series_dict = {}

for name, path in file_paths.items():
    df = pd.read_csv(path)
    scaler = MinMaxScaler(feature_range=(0, 1))
    df['close_scaled'] = scaler.fit_transform(df[['close']])
    
    dataframes[name] = df
    scalers[name] = scaler
    close_series_dict[name] = df['close_scaled'].reset_index(drop=True)
In [4]:
# 2. Chia tập train/val/test
train_series, val_series, test_series = {}, {}, {}

for name, series in close_series_dict.items():
    n = len(series)
    train_size = int(n * 0.7)
    val_size = int(n * 0.1)
    
    train_series[name] = series[:train_size]
    val_series[name] = series[train_size:train_size + val_size]
    test_series[name] = series[train_size + val_size:]
In [5]:
# 3. Hàm tạo dataset dạng time series
def create_dataset(dataset, time_step=10):
    X, y = [], []
    for i in range(len(dataset) - time_step):
        X.append(dataset[i:i + time_step])
        y.append(dataset[i + time_step])
    return np.array(X), np.array(y)
In [6]:
# 4. Tạo tập dữ liệu train/val/test
X_train_dict, y_train_dict = {}, {}
X_val_dict, y_val_dict = {}, {}
X_test_dict, y_test_dict = {}, {}

for name in train_series:
    X_train, y_train = create_dataset(train_series[name].to_numpy())
    X_val, y_val = create_dataset(val_series[name].to_numpy())
    X_test, y_test = create_dataset(test_series[name].to_numpy())

    X_train_dict[name] = X_train
    y_train_dict[name] = y_train
    X_val_dict[name] = X_val
    y_val_dict[name] = y_val
    X_test_dict[name] = X_test
    y_test_dict[name] = y_test
In [7]:
# 5. Xây dựng mô hình LSTM
models_lstm = {}

for name in X_train_dict:
    time_step = X_train_dict[name].shape[1]
    model = Sequential()
    model.add(LSTM(50, input_shape=(time_step, 1)))
    model.add(Dense(1))
    model.compile(optimizer='adam', loss='mean_squared_error')
    models_lstm[name] = model

c:\Users\ADMIN\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python310\lib\site-packages\keras\src\layers\rnn\rnn.py:200: UserWarning: Do not pass an `input_shape`/`input_dim` argument to a layer. When using Sequential models, prefer using an `Input(shape)` object as the first layer in the model instead.
  super().__init__(**kwargs)
In [8]:
# 6. Huấn luyện
histories_lstm = {}
for name in models_lstm:
    print(f"\n⏳ Training {name}...")
    model = models_lstm[name]
    X_tr = X_train_dict[name].reshape(-1, X_train_dict[name].shape[1], 1)
    y_tr = y_train_dict[name]
    X_val = X_val_dict[name].reshape(-1, X_val_dict[name].shape[1], 1)
    y_val = y_val_dict[name]

    history = model.fit(
        X_tr, y_tr,
        validation_data=(X_val, y_val),
        epochs=100,
        batch_size=16,
        verbose=0
    )
    histories_lstm[name] = history

In [9]:
# 7. Dự đoán và đảo chuẩn hóa
y_test_originals = {}
y_pred_lstm_originals = {}

for name in models_lstm:
    model = models_lstm[name]
    scaler = scalers[name]
    
    X_test = X_test_dict[name].reshape(-1, X_test_dict[name].shape[1], 1)
    y_test = y_test_dict[name]
    y_pred = model.predict(X_test)

    # Đảo chuẩn hóa
    y_test_inv = scaler.inverse_transform(y_test.reshape(-1, 1)).flatten()
    y_pred_inv = scaler.inverse_transform(y_pred).flatten()

    y_test_originals[name] = y_test_inv
    y_pred_lstm_originals[name] = y_pred_inv

In [10]:
# 8. Tính metric trên giá trị thực tế
mse_inv, rmse_inv, mae_inv, mape_inv, r2_inv, adj_r2_inv = {},{}, {}, {}, {}, {}
p = 1  # số feature

for name in models_lstm:
    y_true = y_test_originals[name]
    y_pred = y_pred_lstm_originals[name]

    mse = mean_squared_error(y_true, y_pred)
    rmse = np.sqrt(mse)
    mae = mean_absolute_error(y_true, y_pred)
    r2 = r2_score(y_true, y_pred)
    n = len(y_true)
    adj_r2 = 1 - (1 - r2) * (n - 1) / (n - p - 1)

    # MAPE
    nonzero_mask = y_true != 0
    mape = np.mean(np.abs((y_true[nonzero_mask] - y_pred[nonzero_mask]) / y_true[nonzero_mask])) * 100

    # Lưu
    mse_inv[name] = mse
    rmse_inv[name] = rmse
    mae_inv[name] = mae
    mape_inv[name] = mape
    r2_inv[name] = r2
    adj_r2_inv[name] = adj_r2

    print(f"\n{name}:")
    print(f"  MAE       : {mae:.6f}")
    print(f"  MSE       : {mse:.6f}")
    print(f"  RMSE      : {rmse:.6f}")
    print(f"  MAPE      : {mape:.6f}%")
    print(f"  R2        : {r2:.6f}")
    print(f"  Adj R2    : {adj_r2:.6f}")

In [11]:
# 9. Bảng tổng hợp
summary_df = pd.DataFrame({
    "MAE": mae_inv,
    "MSE": mse_inv,
    "RMSE": rmse_inv,
    "MAPE (%)": mape_inv,
    "R2": r2_inv,
    "Adjusted R2": adj_r2_inv
}).T

print("\nBẢNG TỔNG HỢP METRIC TRÊN GIÁ TRỊ THỰC TẾ:")
print(summary_df.T.to_string())

In [12]:
# 10. Vẽ biểu đồ so sánh tập train, val, test và dự đoán
for name in y_test_originals.keys():
    df = dataframes[name]
    scaler = scalers[name]

    original_close = df['close'].to_numpy()
    n = len(original_close)
    train_size = int(n * 0.7)
    val_size = int(n * 0.1)
    test_size = n - train_size - val_size
    time_step = 10

    val_start = train_size
    test_start = train_size + val_size
    pred_start_index = test_start + time_step

    y_pred = y_pred_lstm_originals[name]
    y_test_inv = y_test_originals[name]

    # Tạo biểu đồ
    plt.figure(figsize=(16, 6))

    # Tập train
    plt.plot(range(train_size), original_close[:train_size], label='Giá thực tế (Train)', color='green')

    # Tập val
    plt.plot(range(val_start, test_start), original_close[val_start:test_start], label='Giá thực tế (Val)', color='purple')

    # Tập test (thực tế)
    plt.plot(range(test_start, n), original_close[test_start:], label='Giá thực tế (Test)', color='blue')

    #  Dự đoán LSTM
    plt.plot(range(pred_start_index, pred_start_index + len(y_pred)), y_pred, label='Giá dự báo (LSTM)', color='orange')

    #  Đường phân cách train/val và val/test
    plt.axvline(train_size, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Train/Val split')
    plt.axvline(test_start, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Val/Test split')

    # Tiêu đề và nhãn
    plt.title(f'Dự báo giá đóng cửa - {name}')
    plt.xlabel('Thời gian)')
    plt.ylabel('Giá đóng cửa')
    plt.legend()
    plt.grid(True)
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()
